content:
我们计划在 V2.3 版本中对累计源液提取奖励活动追加以下奖励，这可能会影响到各位的卡池抽取规划，因此提前进行说明。

- 累计提取 2000 源液：忘却篇随机限定唤醒体x1，忘却篇随机限定命轮x1。
- 累计提取 4000 源液：忘却篇随机限定唤醒体x1，忘却篇随机限定命轮x1。
- 累计提取 5000 源液：忘却篇随机限定唤醒体x1，忘却篇随机限定命轮x1。
- 累计提取 8000 源液：忘却篇随机限定唤醒体x1，忘却篇随机限定命轮x1。
- 累计提取 13000 源液：忘却篇任选超维限定唤醒体x1，忘却篇任选超维限定命轮x1。
- 累计提取 16000 源液：忘却篇任选血肉限定唤醒体x1，忘却篇任选血肉限定命轮x1。
- 累计提取 20000 源液：忘却篇任选深海限定唤醒体x1，忘却篇任选深海限定命轮x1。
- 累计提取 25000 源液：忘却篇任选混沌限定唤醒体x1，忘却篇任选混沌限定命轮x1。

在更新完成后，对于此前已经完成该活动的守密人，该活动将重新上线，并可直接领取已达成的累计提取源液任务的尚未领取的奖励。

We plan to add the following rewards to Cumulative Sliver Prime Extraction Rewards in Version V2.3. As this may impact your gacha planning, we are notifying you in advance.

• Accumulate 2,000 Sliver Prime:
Random Faded Legacy limited Awakener ×1, Random Faded Legacy limited Destiny Wheel ×1

• Accumulate 4,000 Sliver Prime:
Random Faded Legacy limited Awakener ×1, Random Faded Legacy limited Destiny Wheel ×1

• Accumulate 5,000 Sliver Prime:
Random Faded Legacy limited Awakener ×1, Random Faded Legacy limited Destiny Wheel ×1

• Accumulate 8,000 Sliver Prime:
Random Faded Legacy limited Awakener ×1, Random Faded Legacy limited Destiny Wheel ×1

• Accumulate 13,000 Sliver Prime:
Selectable Faded Legacy Ultra limited Awakener ×1, Selectable Faded Legacy Ultra limited Destiny Wheel ×1

• Accumulate 16,000 Sliver Prime:
Selectable Faded Legacy Caro limited Awakener ×1, Selectable Faded Legacy Caro limited Destiny Wheel ×1

• Accumulate 20,000 Sliver Prime:
Selectable Faded Legacy Aequor limited Awakener ×1, Selectable Faded Legacy Aequor limited Destiny Wheel ×1

• Accumulate 25,000 Sliver Prime:
Selectable Faded Legacy Chaos limited Awakener ×1, Selectable Faded Legacy Chaos limited Destiny Wheel ×1

After the update, Keepers who previously completed the event will regain access to the event. You may immediately claim any uncollected rewards for accumulated Sliver Prime milestones already achieved.
thread_title: ✅前瞻：V2.3 源液提取追加奖励 Preview：V2.3 Sliver Prime Extra Bonus
